name: libsub-install-perl
title: libsub-install-perl
summary: module for installing subroutines into packages easily
description:
module for installing subroutines into packages easily
Sub::Install module makes it easy to install subroutines into packages
without the unsightly mess of no strict or typeglobs lying about where
just anyone can see them.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libsub-install-perl because module for installing subroutines into packages easily.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libsub-install-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libsub-install-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libsub-install-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
